name: Beef Short Ribs Adobo with Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Have your butcher cross-cut the rib bones into 1-inch long sections. Trim off and discard any excess fat; cut the meat into approximately 1-inch cubes while leaving the bones attached.
2. Place the beef in a saucepan with vinegar, water, soy sauce, garlic, shallots, black pepper, salt, and bay leaves. Bring to a boil.
3. Lower heat and simmer, covered, for 40 minutes. Remove the beef from the pan.
4. Degrease the remaining vinegar liquid; bring it back to a boil.
5. Lower heat and reduce the sauce to about 2/3 cup.
6. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Brown the beef until evenly seared.
7. Pour the reduced sauce over the beef, then add the blanched spinach.
